bouquets.title: Peach Meadow
bouquets.description: A soft and radiant arrangement of peach and blush roses with lush greenery in a straw basket — light and natural.

bouquets.title: Blush Romance
bouquets.description: A premium bouquet of deep pink and ivory roses, complemented by silver eucalyptus — sophisticated and intimate.

bouquets.title: Pastel Garden
bouquets.description: A pastel-toned mix of spray roses and greenery in a woven basket — gentle, airy, and perfect for any occasion.

bouquets.title: Tulip Charm
bouquets.description: A vivid bouquet of bright tulips and roses in a lavender box — cheerful and full of charm.

bouquets.title: Berry Bloom
bouquets.description: A lush mix of rich pink, purple, and cream blooms with textured greens — romantic and elegant.

bouquets.title: Sweet Whisper
bouquets.description: A charming spring bouquet with peonies, roses, and lilac-toned accents — fresh, lively, and expressive.

bouquets.title: Field Joy
bouquets.description: A rustic hand-tied bouquet of sunflowers, lisianthus, and daisies — perfect for brightening the day.

bouquets.title: Soft Bloom
bouquets.description: A delicate bouquet of pink carnations and roses wrapped in satin paper — soft, stylish, and versatile.

bouquets.title: Spring Serenade
bouquets.description: A fresh composition of early spring tulips, delicate ranunculus, and lush garden greens — sweet and inspiring.

bouquets.title: Rose Symphony
bouquets.description: An elegant collection of premium red and white roses accented with delicate baby's breath — classic and timeless.

bouquets.title: Lavender Field
bouquets.description: A calming bouquet featuring aromatic lavender stems, white lisianthus, and silver-dollar eucalyptus.

bouquets.title: Bright Sunshine
bouquets.description: Vibrant sunflowers, yellow roses, and golden lilies gathered in a delightful hand-tied rustic design.

bouquets.title: Romantic Blush
bouquets.description: A dreamy mix of light pink hydrangeas, garden roses, and white spray carnations — pure romance.

bouquets.title: Quiet Forest
bouquets.description: An organic and earthy arrangement of wild green foliage, white ranunculus, and natural branches.

bouquets.title: Golden Glory
bouquets.description: Vibrant yellow dahlias, orange spray roses, and seasonal berries in a beautiful copper-finished container.

bouquets.title: Velvet Night
bouquets.description: A sophisticated, rich arrangement of dark purple calla lilies, burgundy roses, and deep greens.

bestsellers.title: Spring Elegance
bestsellers.description: A delicate blend of peonies, tulips, and roses — perfect for springtime gifting and bright smiles.

bestsellers.title: Crimson Rose
bestsellers.description: A stylish composition of roses, seasonal greenery, and vibrant berries — a bold and elegant floral statement.

bestsellers.title: Sunny Bliss
bestsellers.description: A rich bouquet with lavender, lisianthus, and roses — ideal for those who love deep hues and gentle fragrance.

feedbacks.author: Emma T.
feedbacks.text: Flora made my anniversary unforgettable with their beautiful arrangement!

feedbacks.author: Daniel R.
feedbacks.text: Absolutely stunning bouquet! It looked even better than the photo and arrived right on time.

feedbacks.author: Olivia M.
feedbacks.text: The service was exceptional, and the flowers were fresh!
